name: Best Chocolate Cake with Fudge Frosting
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Unsweetened Chocolate, Melted and Cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a 13 x 9 x 3 inch pan or divide batter between 3 8-inch round pans (or 2 9-inch round pans).
3. In a large bowl, beat all ingredients except fudge frosting on low speed for 30 seconds, scraping the bowl constantly.
4. Beat on high speed for 3 minutes, scraping the bowl constantly.
5. Pour batter into pan(s) and bake for 40-45 minutes in rectangle pan or 30-35 minutes in round pans until a wooden pick inserted comes out clean.
6. Allow rounds to cool for 10 minutes, then remove from pans and let cool completely.
7. Frost with prepared fudge frosting.
Frosting:
2 cups Sugar
1/2 cup Shortening
4 oz Unsweetened Chocolate, Melted and Cooled
2/3 cup Milk
1/2 tsp Salt
2 tsp Vanilla Extract
